items.claim: Conor McGregor's recent controversies and public perception are negatively impacting his star power.
items.quote: I would say all that is is definitely impacting his star power

items.claim: Max Holloway has a history of reinventing himself and remaining relevant after being counted out by analysts.
items.quote: just when you think he's done, he finds a way to reinvent himself in the sport

items.claim: Max Holloway's frequent movement between weight classes (145, 155, and 170) leaves his career path and standing unclear.
items.quote: he kind of feels displaced a little bit. The guy was at 45 not that long ago, fought at 155, now all of a sudden he's at 170. Like, where exactly is he standing?
